scope_goal: Harden command catalog and diff_preview output contracts so labeled/text and JSON responses stay deterministic, verifiable, and ready for CLI-first operator use.
tasks_completed: Corrected diff preview fingerprint semantics so the reported SHA-256 verifies the artifact users actually receive.
Added focused unit coverage for command catalog lookup/projection behavior and diff_preview JSON, no-diff, label, and fingerprint contract paths.
Kept the submitted branch aligned with the approved shared test exceptions for the command contract coverage.
Regenerated the feat-commands handoff packet so it reflects the actual branch delta instead of the stale docs-only packet sync.
roadmap_items: Milestone 1 - Bootstrap Flow Stabilization: harden the command and diff-preview behavior that feeds the CLI-first operator flow.
Milestone 2 - Test Hardening: add focused unit coverage for the exact command-output contract paths introduced on this branch.
vision_capabilities: Capability 3 - Auditable generation: the emitted SHA-256 fingerprint now verifies the exact diff payload returned by the command.
Capability 4 - Operator-first control surface: the CLI-facing diff_preview and command catalog contracts stay stable, deterministic, and test-covered.
routing_provider_impact: None. This branch does not change routing/provider files; it only affects command contracts, diff_preview formatting, and handoff metadata.
kickoff_budget_note: Stayed within the default lane budget. The branch delta is 9 files changed and remains within the lane size limits.
approved_exception_note: Approved shared-file exception for tests/unit/test_commands_catalog.py and tests/unit/test_diff_preview.py to cover the command contract surface alongside the owned-path command and diff_preview changes.
